name: cm-idv-claimant
description: Captures lightweight insurance claimant IDV details for Westfund claim intake. Demo mode accepts any provided name, DOB and optional member id.

fullName.description: Claimant name. Aliases: name, Name, FullName, customerName.

dob.description: DOB dd/mm/yyyy or yyyy-mm-dd. Aliases: DOB, Dob, dateOfBirth.

memberId.description: Optional member id. Aliases: MemberId, memberNumber.

policy.description: Optional policy name. Aliases: Policy, policyName.
